narrative:
Olmsted Township-00-H (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 1,279 registered voters, with 57.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.9%, a modest Democratic lean of 3.4 percentage points.
